arts.ttl: Everton make offer to Australian fan after 10,000-mile journey for postponed Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Mackenzie Kinsella, 15, had travelled from Australia to watch Saturday’s game against Liverpool but Storm Darragh forced the game to be postponed

arts.ttl: Everton fan’s Merseyside derby dream dashed after flying in from Australia
arts.sum: Storm Darragh forces Liverpool game to be called off Fifteen-year-old gets invite to Everton training ground A 15-year-old from Australia used all his savings to attend the final league derby at Goodison Park, only for the match to be postponed four hours before kick-off. The Everton fan from Sydney, Mackenzie Kinsella, asked his Liverpool-born mum at Easter whether he could return to England for the historic occasion. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Everton send perfect offer to Australian supporter as Ric Wee responds to derby postponement
arts.sum: Everton have sent a special invite to a young fan who has made a 21,000-mile return trip from from Australia to see the final Premier League Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool new date could hand Arne Slot rare benefit from Storm Darragh
arts.sum: Paul Gorst reflects on a Merseyside derby day with a difference on Saturday as the final meeting at Goodison Park between Liverpool and Everton was postponed thanks to Storm Darragh

arts.ttl: Manager is now ‘between West Ham and Roma’ – Everton saviours Friedkins could lose out on manager
arts.sum: Former Juventus manager Max Allegri is now ‘between West Ham United and Roma’, which could mean bad news for Everton’s new owners the Friedkins. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that the Everton owners could be set for frustration in their search for a new long-term Roma manager. arts.ttl: Everton fan, 15, spent £1,500 flying from Australia to watch axed Liverpool match
arts.sum: One hugely unfortunate Everton supporter has had to dig deep to travel halfway around the world for his side’s clash with Liverpool only to find out the game was postponed because of Storm Darragh

arts.ttl: When will Everton vs Liverpool be played? Possible new dates after Merseyside derby postponed
arts.sum: Packed fixture schedule makes finding an ideal date for rearranged Goodison Park clash difficult

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes 'massive' Premier League title claim after Everton vs Liverpool postponement
arts.sum: Paul Merson thinks Liverpool's Merseyside derby postponement will give their title rivals a massive opportunity to turn the pressure on this weekend

arts.ttl: Everton-Liverpool postponed - when could game be rescheduled?
arts.sum: Everton vs Liverpool has been postponed after weather warnings caused by Storm Darragh, but when could the Merseyside derby be replayed?

arts.ttl: Everton explain why Merseyside derby had to be postponed
arts.sum: Everton have explained why Saturday's Merseyside derby had to be postponed.
